flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Tennessee State University fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (52.9% → 33.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tennessee State University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (5.9k → 4.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tennessee State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Tennessee State University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (18.6% → 21.8%).
